rolling_30d.summary: Star Blends experienced a significant traffic contraction MoM (-84.3% in sessions) but maintains strong YoY momentum (+810.1%), indicating seasonal volatility rather than fundamental decline. Engaged sessions fell 59.4% MoM yet grew 93.2% YoY, with engagement rate improving 8.1 percentage points despite the overall traffic dip, suggesting the remaining traffic is higher-intent. High-value mainsite_clicks grew 7.4% MoM and 48.5% YoY (101 events), while contact_us events held relatively stable at -5.6% MoM and +30.8% YoY (17 events), demonstrating sustained conversion intent. Direct traffic dominates at 85.1% but fell sharply MoM (-86.4%), though YoY growth of +1744% reflects explosive year-over-year expansion. Organic Search is emerging as a growth channel, up 12.3% MoM and 85.9% YoY (119 sessions), while location-specific pages (/wisconsin, /iowa, /minnesota) show emerging intent with higher engagement rates (42.9–66.7%) despite low volume. YTD 2026 stands at 11,628 sessions vs. 386 in 2025 (+2912.4%), though March 2026 (1,288 sessions) signals deceleration from February's 6,538-session peak.

quick_wins.title: Organic Search Momentum
quick_wins.detail: Organic Search grew 12.3% MoM and 85.9% YoY to 119 sessions. Double down on location and product keyword optimization (calf-feed, dairy-cow terms) to sustain this low-cost, high-intent channel.

quick_wins.title: Location Pages Driving Engagement
quick_wins.detail: /wisconsin (66.7% engagement rate, 6 engaged sessions) and /wisconsin/sparta (60% engagement rate, 3 engaged) significantly outperform the homepage. Replicate this structure and messaging across other state and regional landing pages.

quick_wins.title: mainsite_clicks Outpacing Traffic Decline
quick_wins.detail: mainsite_clicks grew 7.4% MoM (101 events) despite overall traffic falling 84.3%, indicating higher conversion efficiency among remaining visitors. This is a signal to retain and nurture this cohort.

potential_warnings.title: Severe Month-over-Month Traffic Collapse
potential_warnings.detail: Sessions plummeted 84.3% MoM from February's 6,538 to March's 1,288, with Direct traffic down 86.4% MoM. Investigate whether this is expected seasonal decline or a technical/marketing issue (campaign pause, site issue, budget cut).

potential_warnings.title: Store Location Features Underperforming
potential_warnings.detail: store_locate events declined 11.1% MoM and remained flat YoY (8 events), while locate_me dropped 50% YoY (1 event). These are high-intent signals for a retail/feed business and warrant urgent audit of findability and UX.

potential_warnings.title: Location Page Conversion Friction
potential_warnings.detail: Multiple regional/product pages (/wisconsin/westfield/calf-feed, /wisconsin/prairie-farm/calf-feed, /minnesota/minnesota-city/dairy-cow) show 0% engagement despite traffic. These pages may have poor messaging, broken CTAs, or irrelevant content.

potential_warnings.title: Navigational Clicks Declining Sharply
potential_warnings.detail: navigational_clicks fell 61.1% MoM and 50% YoY (7 events), suggesting reduced site exploration and possible navigation friction or reduced repeat visitor intent.

biggest_opportunities.title: Revitalize Direct Traffic Funnel
biggest_opportunities.detail: Direct traffic represents 85.1% of sessions but fell 86.4% MoM. Implement email nurture campaigns, SMS reminders, or remarketing to loyal/repeat customers to stabilize this channel and recover the February baseline.

biggest_opportunities.title: Scale Organic Search with Location + Product Keywords
biggest_opportunities.detail: Organic Search is up 85.9% YoY (119 sessions) and outpacing MoM declines. Expand SEO content targeting low-volume state pages (/iowa, /minnesota) and product-location combinations (e.g., 'calf feed near [city]') to capture emerging organic demand.

biggest_opportunities.title: Fix 0% Engagement Landing Pages
biggest_opportunities.detail: Pages like /wisconsin/westfield/calf-feed, /wisconsin/prairie-farm/calf-feed, and /minnesota/minnesota-city/dairy-cow receive traffic but zero engagement. Audit for missing CTAs, outdated inventory, or misaligned search intent; consider consolidating or redesigning.

biggest_opportunities.title: Optimize Store Locator & Location-Based Conversions
biggest_opportunities.detail: store_locate (8 events) and locate_me (1 event) are critically low for a local/regional product business. Prominently feature store finder on /wisconsin, /iowa, and /minnesota landing pages, and track location-to-call/booking conversion downstream.

last_calendar_month.summary: Star Blends experienced a significant traffic contraction in March 2026, with sessions dropping 80.3% MoM to 1,288, though YoY growth remained strong at +982.4% driven by an exceptionally weak March 2025 baseline. Engagement rate improved 5.8 pp MoM to 11.0%, suggesting that while traffic volume declined sharply, the remaining visitors showed higher intent—evidenced by engaged sessions of 142 (down 58.5% MoM but up 91.9% YoY). High-value mainsite_clicks grew 4.3% MoM to 96 events, offsetting modest declines in outbound_clicks (-6.8%) and contact_us submissions (-16.7%), indicating the funnel is directing traffic toward the primary domain. The homepage (/) remains the strongest performer with 15.3% engagement and 254.2% YoY growth, while location-specific pages like /wisconsin and /iowa show promising engagement rates (66.7% and 42.9% respectively) despite low absolute traffic. Direct traffic dominates at 87.9% of sessions but collapsed 82.4% MoM, while organic search recovered with 11.7% MoM growth, suggesting paid or promotional channels may have wound down. YTD 2026 sits at 11,628 sessions (+2912.4% vs. YTD 2025), but the sharp MoM decline from February's 6,538 sessions signals either seasonal softness or a material shift in marketing spend that warrants investigation.

quick_wins.title: Leverage High-Engagement Location Pages
quick_wins.detail: /wisconsin (66.7% engagement) and /iowa (42.9% engagement) are converting visitors at 3–6× the site average despite minimal traffic; allocate organic search budget or paid social spend toward these geo-targeted landing pages to scale proven intent.

quick_wins.title: Stabilize Organic Search Momentum
quick_wins.detail: Organic search grew 11.7% MoM and 79.7% YoY to 115 sessions; prioritize SEO content for location + product combinations (e.g., 'calf feed Wisconsin') to capitalize on this growing channel and offset direct traffic volatility.

quick_wins.title: Optimize Mainsite Click Flow
quick_wins.detail: Mainsite_clicks (96 events, +4.3% MoM) are the only high-value conversion type showing MoM growth; review homepage-to-main-site CTA placement and messaging to sustain this positive trend.

potential_warnings.title: Severe Session Decline Signals Marketing Pullback
potential_warnings.detail: Sessions fell 80.3% MoM from 6,538 to 1,288, driven entirely by direct traffic collapsing 82.4% MoM; unless this reflects seasonal patterns, verify whether paid campaigns, email, or affiliate channels were paused and consider reactivating if ROI targets allow.

potential_warnings.title: Location Pages Not Converting to Action
potential_warnings.detail: Seven location-specific product pages (/wisconsin/westfield/calf-feed, /cross-plains, /prairie-farm, /rice-lake, /minnesota/kenyon) show 0% engagement despite 7 sessions each, totaling 35 sessions with zero engaged interaction; these pages may need UX refresh or clearer CTAs to funnel traffic toward store_locate or contact_us events.

potential_warnings.title: Store Location Interactions Weakening
potential_warnings.detail: store_locate dropped 22.2% MoM and 12.5% YoY to just 7 events; combined with locate_me at only 1 event, location discovery—a high-intent signal—is severely underperforming and suggests either poor discoverability or declining demand for local store visits.

potential_warnings.title: Contact Form Submissions Declining
potential_warnings.detail: contact_us fell 16.7% MoM to 15 events despite being a key lead driver; monitor form drop-off rates and friction points, as this decline mirrors broader session contraction.

biggest_opportunities.title: Resurrect Direct Traffic Channel
biggest_opportunities.detail: Direct traffic (87.9% of March mix, but -82.4% MoM) likely reflects untracked paid or email campaigns; audit marketing calendar and retrace Feb–Mar channel mix to identify what drove the 6,538→1,288 session cliff and reactivate or replace those revenue sources.

biggest_opportunities.title: Scale Geo-Targeted Content & Paid Campaigns
biggest_opportunities.detail: Wisconsin and Iowa landing pages are generating 3–6× average engagement rates; create dedicated landing pages for other high-opportunity geographies (Minnesota, Illinois) and run geo-targeted organic or paid campaigns to replicate the success of /wisconsin (66.7% engagement, +80% YoY).

biggest_opportunities.title: Fix Broken Location Product Page Funnel
biggest_opportunities.detail: 35 sessions landed on location-specific calf-feed product pages with 0% engagement; audit product page UX, ensure clear navigation to store locator or contact forms, and run A/B tests to convert local intent into store_locate or contact_us events.

biggest_opportunities.title: Expand Organic Social Presence
biggest_opportunities.detail: Organic social grew 100% YoY to 10 sessions but remains negligible; given the strength of geo-targeted landing pages, develop location-specific social content and hashtag strategies to tap into this channel at lower cost than direct or paid search.
